case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ADRIAN LADONN CULPEPPER ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CULPEPPER, ADRIAN LADONN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77 BLUXOME STREET #110 SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CULPEPPER, ADRIAN LADONN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CULPEPPER, ADRIAN LADONN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $1,086.00 RENT, $470.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $480.00 COSTS, $3,391.50 HOLDOVER CHARGES, $174.27 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,253.23, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
